name_cn:
🆕22 Handbag Black Silver
 Original box calfskin grade A👍 Fine and glossy leather,
Soft yet durable, possessing both qualities
Simple appearance hiding many designer's high-end designs, hollow Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of retro sentiment, a relaxed lazy vibe! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm
